content.problemStatement:
Chef is currently in the year XXX in Chefland. He has a time machine that allows him to travel at most 252525 years into the future, but he can use it only once.

Determine whether Chef can reach the year 205020502050 with a single use of the time machine.


Input Format
A single integer XXX, representing current year in Chefland.



Output Format
Print `YES` if Chef can reach the year 2050 , otherwise print `NO`.


You may print each character of the string in uppercase or lowercase (for example, the strings `YES`, `yEs`, `yes`, and `yeS` will all be treated as identical).

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Chef is already in the year 205020502050, so there's no need to use the time machine.

Explanation:
Chef can use the time machine to travel up to 252525 years into the future, but that won't take him beyond the year 202520252025.

Explanation:
By using the time machine, Chef can travel 202020 years into the future, reaching the year 205020502050.

Explanation:
By using the time machine, Chef can travel 252525 years into the future, reaching the year 205020502050.
